prerequisites.label: Python 3.9+
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Python 3.9 or newer. Mac: brew install python@3.12. VPS: ships in the container image.

prerequisites.label: sqlite3 CLI
prerequisites.satisfy: Optional. Install sqlite3 for manual DB inspection. Mac: brew install sqlite. VPS: apt-get install sqlite3.

_interviewPrecondition: FIX H — REPORT-DON'T-BUILD: the AI Workforce interview (interviewComplete) must be complete before run-full-install.sh seeds anything. When it is not, the installer REPORTS commandCenterStatus=interview-pending and exits 0 clean (--update-only exempt); materialize-dept-agents.sh independently refuses (no mutation, --dry-run exempt). This PRE-build precondition complements the POST-build ZHE acceptance gate (Phase 7z / prove-zhe.py) and the build-workforce.py exit-87 genuine-signal fail-close.
